name: Power of the Dominators
desc: If you have no monster in your GY, you can activate this card from your hand. When a card or effect is activated in your opponent GY/banishment, or a card or effect is activated that would move a card from your opponent GY/banishment to a difference place: Negate that effect, then if you have a Trap in your GY, you can add 1 "Dominus" card from your Deck to your hand. If you activate this card from your hand, you cannot Special Summon monster from your hand, GY and banishment, until the end of the next turn. You can only activate 1 "Power of the Dominators" per turn.
strings: Cannot Special Summon from hand, GY, or banishment
